# Trigonometry for slide length

## Short Teaching Summary
Trigonometry for slide length: Trigonometry can be used to find the length of a slide when the height and the angle of inclination are known. Map connection: this idea links by example_of to nearby concepts. Pause point: say the main idea in one short phrase before moving on.
